name: Maitreya
shortDescription: Maitreya is the future Buddha, destined to appear on Earth, achieve complete enlightenment, and teach the pure dharma. He represents hope and the potential for universal enlightenment in the future.
description: Maitreya is the future Buddha, whose coming is prophesied to occur when the dharma has been forgotten by most on Earth. He will be born in Ketumati, which will be ruled by the Chakravarti king Sankha. Maitreya will rediscover the lost dharma and usher in a new age of enlightenment and prosperity. He is currently residing in Tushita Heaven, awaiting the opportune time to descend to Earth. In Buddhist art, Maitreya is often depicted seated on a throne or chair, indicating his readiness to descend. He is a prominent figure in all major Buddhist traditions, including Theravada, Mahayana, and Vajrayana. The concept of Maitreya provides hope for the future and inspires Buddhists to cultivate the conditions necessary for his appearance. The idea is connected to cyclical time and the decline and renewal of dharma, relating to archetypes of cosmic cycles and the return of a golden age. His future arrival shares similarities with messianic prophecies in other religions. The belief in Maitreya's coming serves as a powerful motivation for Buddhist practitioners to strive for enlightenment and to contribute to the creation of a more compassionate and enlightened world.

sources.title: The Princeton Dictionary of Buddhism
sources.author: Robert E. Buswell Jr. and Donald S. Lopez Jr.
